summary: Script code is well-structured with good error handling and clear data model (4/5 quality). However, deliverable CRITICALLY fails task requirements: no test files (TDD mandate violated), no fixture files referenced in workflow, no test harness to validate via act, no act-result.txt generation, no actionlint verification. Workflow merely runs script once without testing. Exits 0 on test failures (line: `if agg.failed > 0: sys.exit(0)`) without clear justification. Fixtures directory referenced but not provided. Not shippable as-is—missing ~80% of required test infrastructure.
